nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 56. South wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 2pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 76. Southeast wind 7 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 63, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. Southeast wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
